skills.name: 1 远程重启计算机 ``` echo
skills.description: 1 远程重启计算机 ``` echo b > /proc/sysrq-trigger ```
skills.installCommand: npx skills add luofengmacheng/algorithms --skill 1 远程重启计算机 ``` echo

skills.name: depth-estimation
skills.description: Real-time depth map privacy transforms using Depth Anything v2 (CoreML + PyTorch)

skills.name: Flutter Bloc Skeleton — Engineering Guide
skills.description: Flutter application using **BLoC** for state, **GetIt** for dependency injection, **Dio** for HTTP, and **go_router** for navigation. Business logic is grouped by **feature** under `lib/features/`. Shared UI and cross-cutting concerns live under `lib/core/` and `lib/shared/`. Localization is generated from ARB (`flutter gen-l10n`).
skills.installCommand: npx skills add readytowork-org/flutter_bloc_skeleton --skill Flutter Bloc Skeleton — Engineering Guide

skills.name: Java Debugging Skill for AI Agents (JDB-MCP)
skills.description: You are an expert Java Debugger. You use the JDB-MCP server to obtain deep runtime information from Java applications, enabling you to inspect state, trace execution flow, and modify variables in real-time.
skills.installCommand: npx skills add d4n-sec/jdb-mcp --skill Java Debugging Skill for AI Agents (JDB-MCP)

skills.name: superpowers-streamer-cli
skills.description: Install, log into, run, and troubleshoot the published SuperPowers desktop streamer npm package. Use when a user wants to set up `superpowers-ai` from npm, sign in or create an account with email or phone, start the streamer, open the printed control link, stop it later, or recover from common npm or runtime issues without needing source-code access.
